name: Thai Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Ginger, Fresh Slices, Finely minced
1/4 Cup Peanut, Dry-roasted, unsalted, Coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil over moderately high heat until a strip of wonton bounces across the surface. Add the wonton strips in batches and fry, turning occasionally, until crisp and golden, about 1 minute. Transfer to paper towels; drain well.
2. In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, chicken, bean sprouts, yellow pepper, and cucumber.
3. In a medium bowl, whisk together the lime juice, fish sauce, brown sugar, chiles, nutmeg, lemon grass, ginger, mint, basil. Add the dressing to the salad and toss well. Gently fold in the crisp wonton strips.
4. Turn out onto a serving platter and sprinkle with the peanuts.
